title: Nigerian Breweries Plc Sustaining Stakeholders Engagement - FinancialEDGE
description: The communications team of Nigerian Breweries Plc, led by Dr. Uzodinma Odenigbo, Corporate Affairs Director, held an interactive hangout with media representatives in Lagos. The event featured key discussions on the company's operations, sustainability initiatives, and engagement with stakeholders. As Corporate Affairs Director, Odenigbo emphasized the company's commitment to driving growth and sustainability in Nigeria.
html:
The communications team of Nigerian Breweries Plc, led by Dr. Uzodinma Odenigbo, Corporate Affairs Director, held an interactive hangout with media representatives in Lagos.

The event featured key discussions on the company’s operations, sustainability initiatives, and engagement with stakeholders.

As Corporate Affairs Director, Odenigbo emphasized the company’s commitment to driving growth and sustainability in Nigeria.

The event provided an opportunity for the media to engage with Nigerian Breweries Plc’s communications team, which includes Ayodele Alabi, Head of Integrated Communication.

The company highlighted its various sustainability initiatives, aimed at supporting local communities and promoting environmental responsibility.

 

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Dr Uzodinma Odenigbo, Corporate Affairs Director, Nigerian Breweries Plc,  Ayodele Alabi, Head of Integrated Communication, Nigerian Breweries Plc and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project  Director Financial Edge during an interactive hangout with Nigerian Breweries Plc communications team in Lagos.
